evidence_cards.claim: Hades is a pcgamingwiki source candidate for the player question.
evidence_cards.risk_note: Source candidate only; needs page-level extraction before recommending an answer.

publish_decision.recommended_next_action: Keep as source candidate research until answer-level evidence and ranked steps exist.
reasons: No ranked solution steps were produced from the available evidence.
